//: Deployable apps, consumed by scripts/{bundle,deploy}-env.sh + deploy-apps.yml. Add an app by adding an entry. `environments` lists which of main|labs|staging|production this app deploys to (the manual dispatch derives its app set from the env). `bundleTask` builds it (bundle-env.sh); `outDir` is its bundle output (repo-relative). `wranglerConfig` is a committed Workers config (repo-relative) — deploy-env.sh runs `wrangler deploy --config <it> --env <environment>`, so the Worker name + any bindings live in that file's [env.<environment>] section (production = bare name w/ custom domain, other envs = <name>-<env>). composer ships a `_worker.js` Worker + bindings; the rest are assets-only. NOTE: the example-app entries (todomvc/tasks/testbench) are provisional — confirm bundleTask/outDir/config as part of the Cloudflare Pages -> Workers migration (see docs/design/app-release-spec.md).
